CAREERS AT BIOTHERA
Build the Future of EV Skincare.

We are building EV biomanufacturing infrastructure from the ground up. We are only interested in people who want to change the field вАФ not just work in it.

We do not have open postings. We hire for character, capability, and conviction first. If you believe in what we are building and want to be considered for future roles вАФ research, manufacturing, regulatory, BD, or operations вАФ we want to hear from you.

PREREQUISITE вАФ ALL ROLES

Familiarity with AI systems is a prerequisite for every role at BioThera. We expect our team to think with, build with, and stay ahead of AI tools.

Express Interest

No open role? Tell us who you are. We keep a file of exceptional people.
